hooks.prompt: A UI file was just edited. Quickly check: (1) Are keybindings consistent with the project convention (esc=back, q=home, space=pin, /=filter, r=refresh)? (2) Does the hint text at the bottom match actual keybindings? (3) Are error states handled with an escape route? Only report ISSUES found, nothing else. If all good, say nothing.

A plugin file was just edited. Quickly check: (1) Are keybindings consistent with the project convention (esc=back, q=home, space=pin, /=filter, r=refresh)? (2) Does the hint text at the bottom match actual keybindings? (3) Are error states handled with an escape route? Only report ISSUES found, nothing else. If all good, say nothing.

Run a UX consistency review of the terraform-ui TUI. Check: (1) All plugins handle esc consistently (deactivate back to home). (2) All error views offer r=retry and esc=back. (3) Keybinding hints match actual handleKey implementations. (4) No dead-end states where user gets stuck. Read the plugin handleKey methods and compare with hint text in View(). Report only ISSUES as a short bulleted list. If everything is consistent, output nothing.
